mnemonics.title: VM Isolation Types
mnemonics.content: **C**PU, **M**emory, **I**O, **N**etwork = **CMIN** (Think: **C**an **M**y **I**solation **N**ever break?). Hardware: VT-x (CPU), page tables (Memory), VT-d/SR-IOV (I/O), vSwitch/VLAN (Network).

mnemonics.title: Golden Image Rules
mnemonics.content: **T**rusted source, **H**arden, **S**can, **I**mmutable, **N**o secrets = **THSIN** (Think: **T**emplates **H**ave **S**ecurity **I**n **N**ature). Never embed passwords or API keys in images!
